component.name: Administrator_listQueues
component.description: List the queues. ```ballerina asb:QueueList? queues = check admin->listQueues(); ```

component.name: Administrator_queueExists
component.description: Check whether the queue exists. ```ballerina boolean exists = check admin->queueExists("queue-1"); ```

component.name: Administrator_deleteTopic
component.description: Delete the topic with the given name. ```ballerina check admin->deleteTopic("topic-1"); ```

component.name: Administrator_createRule
component.description: Create a rule with the given name or name and options. ```ballerina asb:RuleProperties? properties = check admin->createRule("topic-1", "sub-a", "rule-1"); ```

component.name: Administrator_createTopic
component.description: Create a topic with the given name or name and options. ```ballerina asb:TopicProperties? topicProperties = check admin->createTopic("topic-1"); ```

component.name: Administrator_updateQueue
component.description: Update the queue with the options. ```ballerina asb:QueueProperties? queueProperties = check admin->updateQueue("queue-1", maxDeliveryCount = 10); ```

component.name: Administrator_deleteSubscription
component.description: Delete the subscription with the given name. ```ballerina check admin->deleteSubscription("topic-1", "sub-a"); ```

component.name: Administrator_createSubscription
component.description: Create a subscription with the given name or name and options. ```ballerina asb:SubscriptionProperties? subscriptionProperties = check admin->createSubscription("topic-1", "sub-a"); ```

component.name: Administrator_updateSubscription
component.description: Update the subscription with the given options. ```ballerina asb:SubscriptionProperties? subProp = check admin->updateSubscription("topic-1", "sub-a", maxDeliveryCount = 10); ```

component.name: Administrator_listRules
component.description: List the rules. ```ballerina asb:RuleList? rules = check admin->listRules("topic-1", "sub-a"); ```

component.name: Administrator_deleteRule
component.description: Delete the rule with the given name. ```ballerina check admin->deleteRule("topic-1", "sub-a", "rule-1"); ```

component.name: Administrator_getTopic
component.description: Get the topic with the given name. ```ballerina asb:TopicProperties? topicProperties = check admin->getTopic("topic-1"); ```

component.name: Administrator_listTopics
component.description: List the topics. ```ballerina asb:TopicList? topics = check admin->listTopics(); ```

component.name: Administrator_updateTopic
component.description: Update the topic with the given options. ```ballerina asb:TopicProperties? topicProp = check admin->updateTopic("topic-1", supportOrdering = true); ```

component.name: Administrator_topicExists
component.description: Get the status of existance of a topic with the given name. ```ballerina boolean exists = check admin->topicExists("topic-1"); ```

component.name: Administrator_subscriptionExists
component.description: Get the status of existance of a subscription with the given name. ```ballerina boolean exists = check admin->subscriptionExists("topic-1", "sub-a"); ```

component.name: Administrator_getRule
component.description: Get the rule with the given name. ```ballerina asb:RuleProperties? properties = check admin->getRule("topic-1", "sub-a", "rule-1"); ```

component.name: Administrator_getQueue
component.description: Get the queue with the given name. ```ballerina asb:QueueProperties? queueProperties = check admin->getQueue("queue-1"); ```

component.name: Administrator_listSubscriptions
component.description: List the subscriptions. ```ballerina asb:SubscriptionList? subscriptions = check admin->listSubscriptions("topic-1"); ```

component.name: Administrator_createQueue
component.description: Create a queue with the given name or name and options. ```ballerina asb:QueueProperties queueProperties = check admin->createQueue("queue-1"); ```

component.name: Administrator_getSubscription
component.description: Get the subscription with the given name. ```ballerina asb:SubscriptionProperties? subscriptionProperties = check admin->getSubscription("topic-1", "sub-a"); ```

component.name: Administrator_deleteQueue
component.description: Delete the queue with the given name. ```ballerina check admin->deleteQueue("queue-1"); ```

component.name: Administrator_updateRule
